# PERF-053 negative: math/rand.New used to avoid the global mutex
lang: go
file: PERF-053-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"math/rand"
	"net/http"
	"sync"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var (
	rngMu sync.Mutex
	rng   = rand.New(rand.NewSource(1))
)

func RollDiceSafe(c *gin.Context) {
	rngMu.Lock()
	n := rng.Intn(6) + 1
	rngMu.Unlock()
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"roll": n})
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
